info.title: StowStack API
info.description: API for StowStack — the demand engine for self-storage operators. All admin endpoints require an `X-Admin-Key` header. Organization endpoints require an `X-Org-Token` header. Client portal endpoints require an `X-Access-Code` header.

OrgToken.name: X-Org-Token
OrgToken.description: Organization JWT for partner portal endpoints

ApiKey.description: API key for programmatic access (sk_live_...). Scoped per organization. Pass as: Authorization: Bearer sk_live_...

secret.description: HMAC signing secret (only returned on creation)

key.description: Full API key (only returned on creation)

post.description: Public endpoint. Validates form data, stores facility record, sends notification emails via Resend.

get.summary: List facility leads with pipeline status

patch.summary: Update lead pipeline status or details

post.summary: Submit a consumer lead from a landing page

get.summary: List UTM tracked links for a facility
Redirect short URL and track click
List organizations or get a single org

post.summary: Invite a user to the organization

get.summary: List ad creatives for a facility
List A/B tests for a facility

post.summary: Create or update an A/B test

get.summary: List tracking numbers for a facility
Get call logs and analytics for a facility

post.summary: Update tenant data or trigger actions

get.summary: List GBP reviews for a facility

post.summary: Create or publish a GBP post
Create a referral code or record a referral

get.summary: Get drip sequence status for a lead

post.summary: Enroll, pause, resume, or cancel a drip sequence

get.summary: Get PMS data snapshot for a facility
Generate or retrieve an audit report
Get a shared audit by slug

post.summary: Capture partial form data for abandoned lead recovery
Add or update a dev note
Add or remove a commit flag

patch.summary: Update or vote on an idea

post.summary: Generate ad copy via Claude AI

get.summary: Get marketing plan for a facility
List API keys for an organization

200.description: List of API keys (key_prefix shown, never full key)

post.description: Admin only. Returns the full key once — store it securely.

get.description: Returns facilities belonging to the authenticated organization. Supports pagination and status filtering.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Get a single facility by ID

404.description: Facility not found or not owned by org

get.summary: List unit types for a facility
get.description: Returns unit inventory with occupancy counts and public pricing. Excludes internal rate data (actual_avg_rate, push_rate, ecri).

post.description: Create or update unit types. Send a single unit or { units: [...] } for bulk. Triggers unit.updated webhook.

get.summary: Get available units with active specials
get.description: Public-friendly availability view. Returns only units with vacant_count > 0, with matching specials attached.

post.description: Pass id to update an existing special. Triggers special.created or special.updated webhook.

get.description: Returns leads for the organization's facilities. Excludes internal analytics (scroll_depth, ip_hash) and revenue data (monthly_revenue).

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Get a single lead by ID

parameters.name: since
parameters.description: Filter leads created after this timestamp

post.description: Push a reservation, inquiry, or lead into StowStack from an external system. Triggers lead.created webhook.

patch.description: Update lead status, contact info, or notes. Triggers lead.updated webhook.

get.description: Pass ?id= to get a single webhook with recent delivery history.

200.description: Webhook list or single webhook with deliveries

post.description: Register a URL to receive event notifications. The signing secret is returned only on creation — store it securely. Webhook URL must use HTTPS.

get.description: Returns daily PMS snapshots for a facility (occupancy, move-ins/outs, delinquency). Excludes revenue data (gross_potential, actual_revenue).

post.description: Upsert a facility snapshot for a given date. Used by PMS systems to push daily occupancy data.

get.description: Returns tenants for a facility or a single tenant by ID. Includes payment history for single tenant lookups.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Get single tenant with payment history

200.description: Tenant list or single tenant with payments

post.description: Import tenants from a PMS. Upserts on (facility_id, external_id) if external_id is provided.

get.description: Read-only. Returns landing pages with sections and UTM links for a facility. Use slug or id for single page, facilityId for listing.

200.description: Landing page(s) with sections and UTM links

get.summary: Get call tracking logs and stats
get.description: Read-only. Use summary=true for aggregate stats and tracking number breakdown, or paginate through individual call records.
Returns request counts, error rates, latency, and daily breakdown for the authenticated organization's API usage.

200.description: Usage summary, daily breakdown, by-endpoint, by-key, and recent errors

tags.name: What's New
tags.description: Dev notes, flags, comments, and ideas

tags.name: Public API v1
tags.description: Versioned API for PMS integrations and external tools. Auth via Bearer token (API key). See /api/v1/api-keys to create keys.
